signal: Teaching repo restructured: spoke/current/ for spoke-targeted teachings, hub-only/current/ for hub-internal. Eliminates wasted tokens from spokes evaluating irrelevant hub teachings. cross_spoke/ retired — all spoke teachings in one folder.
rationale: Spokes were wasting context budget scanning 40+ teachings to find the 2-3 relevant ones. Clean separation reduces wakeup token cost and prevents confusion.
